diagrams.title: Anonymous Pipe Structure
diagrams.description: Shows how an anonymous pipe connects a parent and child process with read and write ends
diagrams.purpose: Understanding pipe creation between related processes

diagrams.title: Shell Pipeline Execution
diagrams.description: Illustrates how shell executes cmd1 | cmd2 using pipes
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how shell pipelines work internally

diagrams.title: FIFO (Named Pipe) Communication
diagrams.description: Shows two unrelated processes communicating through a named pipe file
diagrams.purpose: Understanding named pipe differences from anonymous pipes
